name: Bean Soup Veneto-Style-Pasta e Fagioli Alla V
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Beef stock OR 4 cups Canned beef broth
2 slices Prosciutto rind OR 2 slices Salt pork
1 sprig fresh rosemary OR 1 teaspoon Dried rosemary
1/4 pound Small elbow macaroni OR 1/4 pound Arborio rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans in a large bowl. Add enough cold water to cover and let stand overnight.
2. Drain and rinse beans thoroughly.
3. Prepare meat broth by simmering the beef stock or beef broth with 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
4. In a large saucepan, add beans, remaining meat (prosciutto rind or salt pork), carrot, celery, and onion to the broth.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and let it simmer for 50 to 60 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. In a small saucepan, heat 3 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat. Add rosemary and cook until lightly browned. Discard rosemary.
7. Add parsley and garlic to the saucepan; sauté until garlic changes color.
8. Stir in flour, cooking for about 1 minute. Remove 1 cup of cooking liquid from the bean mixture.
9. Stir in tomato paste and the flour mixture into the bean mixture. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Cook for 5 to 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
11. Add the bean mixture to the saucepan. With a slotted spoon, place a third of the bean mixture in a blender or food processor until smooth. Return to the saucepan.
12. Bring soup to a boil. Add pasta or rice and cook over high heat for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring several times during cooking.
13. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
14. Stir in 1 tablespoon of olive oil and 1/3 cup Parmesan cheese into the soup.
15. Serve hot with additional Parmesan cheese.
